name: RESOL HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd.
summary: RESOL HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the hotel, golf, and resort management businesses in Japan. The company provides welfare programs, including life support services. It is also involved in the renewable energy; and real estate related/investment revitalization businesses. The company was formerly known as Resort Solution Co., Ltd. and changed its name to RESOL HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. in October 2016. RESOL HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
